channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump travels to France for first G7 summit since US-Iran war began
item.description: Held in Évian-les-Bains, France from June 15-17, this will be the president's fifth in-person attendance at the conference, amid heightened...

item.title: WATCH: Tourists celebrate World Cup across the US
item.description: ABC News' Danny New highlights World Cup celebrations featuring bagpipes and Pikachu.

item.title: Iran and US reach peace deal, Trump and Pakistani prime minister say
item.description: Pakistan's prime minister said Sunday the US and Iran had reached a deal including "the immediate and permanent termination of military operations...

item.title: Congo reports record one-day increase in Ebola cases, month after outbreak's discovery
item.description: Congolese authorities have reported a significant rise in Ebola cases, with 72 new cases in one day.
